title: dendrorkis pyramidalis
intro: Dendrocalamus giganteus is not the same as Dendrocalamus, the actual Dendrocalamus plant. However, I found that Dendrocalamus has the following information: Dendrocalamus giganteus is a synonym for Dendrocalamus brandisii, a synonym is not the same as the plant itself though. Dendrocalamus brandisii is a plant.
